summary.key_theme: 公司在免疫學、機器人手術與精神健康領域的臨床數據表現強勁，持續推動研發管線與市場成長動能。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson investigational co-antibody therapy JNJ-4804 shows potential to raise the bar for clinical efficacy in treating refractory inflammatory bowel disease
bullish.reason: JNJ-4804 在治療發炎性腸道疾病的 Phase 2b 數據表現優異，顯示其具備成為同類最佳藥物的潛力，對公司免疫學產品線具重大意義。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson study shows TREMFYA® (guselkumab) is the first and only IL-23 inhibitor to demonstrate efficacy in perianal fistulizing Crohn's disease
bullish.reason: TREMFYA 在 Phase 3 FUZION 研究中達成主要終點，作為首個且唯一的 IL-23 抑制劑展現療效，將顯著擴大其在克隆氏症治療的市場份額。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson Announces Pivotal Clinical Study Results for a New Soft-Tissue Surgical Robotic System
bullish.reason: Ottava 機器人手術系統在臨床研究中達成安全與效能指標，標誌著公司在 MedTech 領域的技術突破與競爭力提升。

bullish.title: Johnson & Johnson’s (JNJ) Accelerating Growth Justifies the Higher Multiple
bullish.reason: Baron Health Care Fund 指出公司成長動能加速，足以支撐目前的估值溢價，反映機構投資人對其長期基本面的信心。

bullish.title: CAPLYTA® (lumateperone) showed greatest improvement across key efficacy outcomes among adjunctive MDD treatments in new network meta-analysis
bullish.reason: 網絡統合分析顯示 CAPLYTA 在重度憂鬱症輔助治療中表現領先，有助於鞏固其在精神健康產品組合中的市場地位。

bearish.title: Breach Of Contract, IP Rights, And Irreparable Harm: Lessons From The Third Circuit’s Stelara Decision
bearish.reason: 法院駁回了針對 Stelara 的禁制令申請，雖對短期專利保護構成挑戰，但影響範圍相對有限，故列為低影響。

neutral.title: Is Johnson & Johnson Still the Ultimate Safe Dividend Stock to Buy?
neutral.reason: 探討公司作為股息貴族的穩定性，屬於長期投資觀點，對股價短期波動影響較小。

neutral.title: Johnson & Johnson launches "Generation Fine," a New Movement Encouraging Patients to Expect More from Depression Treatment and Aim for Remission
neutral.reason: 屬於企業社會責任與品牌行銷活動，雖有助於提升品牌形象，但對財務表現無直接立即影響。

neutral.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為 Zacks.com 用戶關注度分析，屬於市場情緒指標，並非公司基本面變動。

neutral.title: Final Trade: DAL, HNGE, Mag 7, JNJ
neutral.reason: 財經節目短評，缺乏具體分析深度，對股價影響力微弱。
